description: As a Security Compliance Officer at an aerospace defense contractor, you are conducting a mandatory quarterly physical inventory of classified devices assigned to 'SCIF Alpha'. Perform a physical audit for SEC-LPT-01, SEC-LPT-02, and SEC-LPT-03, setting the next audit date to 2026-06-08 with the note 'Audited successfully in SCIF Alpha'. For SEC-LPT-04, record its audit with a next audit date of 2026-06-08, update its location to 'SCIF Bravo', and include the note 'Found in SCIF Bravo, location updated during audit'. Since SEC-LPT-05 is missing, update its status to 'Lost/Stolen' with the note 'Reported missing during Q1 physical audit'. Do not modify any other assets in the system.
